title: CRITICAL: globals.css not delivered to consumers — library unusable out of the box
description:
C1: src/styles/globals.css is only imported in src/main.tsx and .storybook/preview.tsx — NEVER imported by the library entry point (src/components/ui/index.ts). The CSS contains all emboss color tokens, shadcn semantic vars, @layer base, and spring utilities. None of these are in the dist/ bundle. A consumer who installs the library gets zero design tokens. Components render with no emboss colors, no shadcn semantic colors, no body defaults. Complete showstopper.

Additionally (C2): The README says `import 'vanguard-emboss-uikit/styles'` but the package.json exports field has no `"./styles"` entry and no CSS file exists in dist/. Every consumer gets a compile error on first import.
resolution: Imported globals.css in library entry point, added ./styles export in package.json
